title: featurly
description: A fully client side modpack with a lot of features.
body:
featurly is a heavily optimized and feature-packed client-side modpack.

### Main Features
-ViaFabricPlus - Allows you to join any server, reguardless of version.

-Sodium, Iris, and ModernFix - Allows the game to run way faster than vanilla Minecraft, as well as adding shader support!

-Nvidium - Massive performace gains with shaders off.

-Recursive Resources - Gives the Resource Pack screen folder support.

-CIT Resewn - Allows for custom item textures.

-e4mc - Lets you host your world online, allowing anyone with the IP to join!

-EatServerPacks - Dont want to use a server resource pack? Eat it!

-Resourcify - Uses Modrinths API to download resource, data, and shader packs, without having to leave your game!

-Dozens of resource packs, all organized in their own folders.

-And much, much more!


### But do i get good frames?
Yes, you do!
This modpack was tested on the following specs:

**Nvidia GeForce GTX 1660 TI - 6GB VRAM**

**Intel i5-9400F @ 2.90 GHz**

**16GB RAM at 2400 MHz**

At 1080p on Windows 11 with 7GB RAM, 16 chunks render distance and 5 chunks simulation distance, I was able to get around ~300-400 fps without shaders, however milage will vary!


[A screenshot of my game, without any shaders, and an FPS counter in the corner.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1245c468549a83e670c87bb3543dbd1c9330f62b.png)
